Video.summary: A stray dog loyal to Bill Gentry is the only witness in the murder of Susan Sayres's father.
Video.title: The Third Passenger

Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: A lawyer who has turned to the bottle is ostracized when he refuses to help a miner.
Video.title: Justice at Jackson Creek

Video.summary: John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old gang member comes to town.
Video.title: Preacher with a Past

Video.summary: Abel Duncan is dying, and his last request is for an ordained minister to preside over his funeral.
Video.title: Abel Duncan's Dying Wish

Video.summary: An outlaw's daughter feels that her father was murdered unjustly and is bent on revenge.
Video.title: Girl with a Gun

Video.summary: A husband and wife catch trouble when they allow an Apache chief's granddaughter to stay with them.
Video.title: Suzie

Video.summary: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
Video.title: The Hat That Wore the West

Image.alt: The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
Video.title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Image.alt: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.
Video.title: Shadow of Violence

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: A father who raised a cold-hearted killer worries his younger son may turn out the same way.
Video.title: Deadly Decision

Video.summary: Peaceful Jack Slade changes into a vengeful gunman after he's attacked by a thief.
Video.title: The Man Who Died Twice

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: The story of Wyatt, Virgil, Morgan Earp and Doc Holliday after their gunfight with outlaws.
Video.title: After the O.K. Corral

Video.summary: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him for secret government information.
Video.title: Matter of Honor

Video.summary: Pauline runs a saloon in Casa Grande and has shown she neither needs nor wants a husband.
Video.title: The Wooing of Perilous Pauline

Video.summary: A father outsmarts a wily Indian.
Video.title: The Lucky Cow

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.
Video.title: Fighting Sky Pilot

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband West, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.
Video.title: No Place for a Lady

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Everyone's deserting wagon master Ezra Meeker - except his wife and an accused murderer.
Video.title: Devil's Gate

Video.summary: In a brawling frontier town, Sister Blandina tries to stop a hanging.
Video.title: The Fastest Nun in the West

Image.alt: The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West
The Fastest Nun in the West

Video.summary: Sailor William Richardson falls in love with the Mexican comandante's daughter.
Video.title: The Water Bringer

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: After a settler's son is taken during an Apache raid, an Army doctor leads a small band for rescue.
Video.title: The Hero of Apache Pass

Video.summary: Calamity Jane meets Wild Bill Hickok.
Video.title: A Calamity Called Jane

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: Warren takes an unreasonable dislike to his stepmother after returning to his father's ranch.
Video.title: Siege at Amelia's Kitchen

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit
